name: Tiramisu
recipeIngredient: 1 9- or 10-inch Pan di Spagna, baked and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Pan di Spagna into vertical slices about 1/4-inch thick.
2. Place a layer of the slices in the bottom of a shallow 2-quart dish, such as a gratin dish.
3. Soak with one-third of the syrup using a brush.
4. Spread half the filling over the slices.
5. Repeat with more Pan di Spagna and soak with the remaining syrup.
6. Whip the cream with sugar until it holds its shape.
7. Spread this mixture on top of the dessert.
8. Decorate with cinnamon, ground coffee, or cocoa powder.
9. Refrigerate for several hours before serving.
